jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at NHPC
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!
